confidence_notes: All skills extracted from concrete work experience (internship) and deployed projects with explicit technology mentions. Skills section corroborated by project implementations. No aspirational skills included.

projects.name: InternTracker — Job Application Tracker
projects.summary: Full-stack SaaS application with React frontend, Node.js backend, and PostgreSQL database. Features include Clerk authentication, drag-and-drop Kanban board, and email reminders. Deployed to AWS EC2 and live at interntracker.io. Achieved 500+ registered users within 2 weeks of launch and won Best Solo Hack at HackUCLA 2024.

projects.name: PricePulse — E-Commerce Price Monitor
projects.summary: Python-based web scraper deployed as AWS Lambda cron job monitoring 3,000+ product listings daily. Sends email alerts for price drops exceeding 15%. Handles 10,000+ requests per day with Redis caching layer reducing repeat API calls by 80%.

projects.name: FinanceApp Inc. Dashboard Optimization
projects.summary: Rebuilt user dashboard with React and TypeScript, optimizing performance through code-splitting and lazy loading. Optimized PostgreSQL queries with composite indexes. Shipped to production serving 22,000 monthly active users.

impact_highlights.description: Reduced dashboard page load time by implementing code-splitting and lazy loading of heavy chart components in React.
Optimized PostgreSQL queries by adding composite indexes to slow database queries.
impact_highlights.metric: 62% reduction in average query time (from 850ms to 320ms)

impact_highlights.description: Deployed full-stack SaaS application to production with rapid user adoption.
impact_highlights.metric: 500+ registered users within 2 weeks of launch

impact_highlights.description: Won hackathon competition for full-stack job application tracker.
Deployed Python scraper handling high-volume e-commerce price monitoring with efficient caching.
impact_highlights.metric: 10,000+ requests per day; 80% reduction in repeat API calls via Redis caching

impact_highlights.description: Shipped production feature to large user base on Vercel.

confidence_metrics.confidence_notes: All 12 skills directly corroborated by internship experience and deployed projects with explicit technology mentions. No self-reported-only skills included. Strong evidence of deployment and measurable impact across all projects.
